name: Banking lending - day du
description: Quy trinh cho vay SME voi actor, system, scope va du lieu kha day du.

input.businessObjective: Chuan hoa quy trinh tiep nhan, tham dinh, phe duyet va giai ngan khoan vay SME co kiem soat rui ro.
input.scope: Tu luc khach hang SME nop nhu cau vay den khi khoan vay duoc phe duyet, tu choi hoac giai ngan.
input.scopeBoundary: Bao gom tiep nhan ho so, KYC, tham dinh tin dung, phe duyet, hoan thien dieu kien va giai ngan. Khong bao gom thu hoi no sau giai ngan.

startEnd.startEvent: Khach hang SME gui nhu cau vay von
startEnd.endEvent: Khoan vay duoc giai ngan hoac ho so bi tu choi

name: Brief phuc tap - nhieu exception
description: Lending process co nhieu cap phe duyet, reject path va resubmission.

processInfo.processName: Phe duyet khoan vay doanh nghiep co tai san bao dam

input.businessObjective: Kiem soat chat che quy trinh phe duyet khoan vay co tai san bao dam, dam bao traceability giua ho so, tham dinh, phe duyet va dieu kien giai ngan.
input.scope: Tu luc RM tao ho so vay co tai san bao dam den khi ho so duoc phe duyet, tu choi, yeu cau bo sung hoac tai nop.
input.scopeBoundary: Bao gom tham dinh tai chinh, tham dinh tai san bao dam, phan luong theo han muc, phe duyet nhieu cap, reject path va re-submission. Khong bao gom xu ly sau giai ngan.

startEnd.startEvent: RM tao ho so vay co tai san bao dam
startEnd.endEvent: Ho so co quyet dinh cuoi cung va trang thai duoc cap nhat
